title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial on using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. Covers installation of Ollama, setup of Claude Code, LLM selection including Qwen 3.5, and construction of a travel agency AI app using Python and Flask with multiple agents.
